content:
India Winter Travel Destinations

The Best India Winter Travel Destinations

If regular work schedules are taking away your enthusiasm towards your life then a pleasing adventure holiday is highly recommended. It is a true way to rejuvenate your soul if you are tired of doing same and hectic work everyday. Although, anytime is perfect when you are planning to your start-off your refreshment in India, but winter season can add-up more relaxation. There are plenty of scopes to experience a dream vacation in India. Some of the unveiled destinations in India which are among the top list are:

Alui- First pick of skiers!

Located at the height of 9,500-10,500 ft in Uttaranchal, Alui is a premier ski resort of India. Snowy slopes of mountain are sweetly scented with pine making it a great and exciting destination not only for skiers but nature lovers too. Auli’s temples and hot springs are other hot spots which are most visited tourists’ sites.

Leh Ladakh- Veiled, yet not unexplored

If you are among the people who love to explore spiritual ambience in calm and cool place then Leh Ledakh can be a perfect tourist paradise for you. It is equally adventurous for youngsters who can view lovely landscapes, azure weather and noticeable silence that make this place special and different from other places. Perched at the height of 7500 meters, its temperature is always lies below minus degree.

Shimla-Manali- Archetypal hill station

Shimla is an excellent place to see planes and hills covered with white blanket from the month of December to January. This can be yet another winter destination where you can discover number of visiting places like temples, churches, colonial mansions etc. Adding to this, as a vacationer you may also visit markets of Shimla that features some of the best collection of exclusive handmade decoratives or utility pieces.

Nainital-Massuri-Hills of heaven

Nainital is city that is always counted as a distinct city along with unique geographic condition. It is surrounded by lakes and constitutes nine pear shaped lakes. On the other hand Massuri can be an ideal place to view rare sites, as one can watch magnificent views of the vast plain to the south, or of the mass of tangled ridges lying north, bounded by the great snowy range, from the top of the higher peaks.

Kashmir & Gulmarg- Places of flower and boathouses

Kashmir being a wonderful destination for enjoying boating and boat house has become a hot place for tourists. Since, it is specially meant for tourist, all the places are well managed according to tourists’ comfort. Gulmarg is another well known destination, located 52 km from Srinagar having an average elevation of 2,690 m (8,825 ft). This is an ideal place where you can get a close view of snow covered hills and feel the joy of pleasant weather.

Sikkim Darjeeling-Place of tea farms

This is another place to view slopes of mountain covered not just with snow but with tea plants. Famous for its tea industry it is an ideal place for nature lovers. Apart from snow you can have a typical experience of watching workers working in the tea farms.

Watching winter in India can compel you to change your vision towards life and nature. To explore in large a well planned package can be a better idea. There are several travel agencies and operators who are known to provide tour packages at reasonable rates. So, pick one of them and get ready to enjoy and experience an exotic holiday.

If regular work schedules are taking away your enthusiasm towards your life then a pleasing adventure holiday is highly recommended. It is a true way to rejuvenate your soul if you are tired of doing same and hectic work everyday.
